name.description: A new name for the counterparty. Will only update if passed.

email.description: A new email for the counterparty.

metadata.description: Additional data in the form of key-value pairs. Pairs can be removed by passing an empty string or `null` as the value.

send_remittance_advice.description: If this is `true`, Modern Treasury will send an email to the counterparty whenever an associated payment order is sent to the bank.

legal_entity_id.description: The id of the legal entity.

taxpayer_identifier.description: Either a valid SSN or EIN.

external_id.description: An optional user-defined 180 character unique identifier.
